title: polystichum setosum
intro: Polystichum setosum, also known as the hairy fern or five-fingered fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum setosum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Polystichum setosum are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
